scenes.voice_text: GluMira provides structured, longitudinal glucose and insulin data across a diverse global patient population — with consent-based anonymisation and export functionality built in from the ground up.
scenes.visual_note: World map with data points. Clean, academic aesthetic. No decorative elements.

scenes.voice_text: Patient profiles include diabetes type, comorbidity flags, dietary regime, insulin pharmacokinetic parameters, regional variables, and continuous glucose data. All fields are schema-consistent and exportable in standard formats.
scenes.subtitle_text: Rich structured patient data. Schema-consistent. Exportable.
scenes.visual_note: Data schema diagram — clean, structured, with field annotations

scenes.voice_text: The pattern detection engine surfaces anomalies across 7, 14, and 30-day rolling windows — flagging hypoglycaemia clusters, post-prandial excursion patterns, nocturnal variability, and basal drift across cohorts.
scenes.subtitle_text: Pattern detection across rolling windows. Cohort-level analysis.
scenes.visual_note: Multi-patient glucose grid with pattern flags. Cohort-level overlay.

scenes.voice_text: GluMira's population spans diverse dietary regimes, regional insulin formularies, and comorbidity profiles — including coeliac, thyroid, ADHD, gastroparesis, pregnancy, and paediatric growth cohorts.
scenes.subtitle_text: Diverse cohorts. 20 dietary regimes. Global formularies.
scenes.visual_note: Population segmentation visual — regime breakdown, comorbidity flags, regional spread

scenes.voice_text: Data export is available in CSV, JSON, and FHIR-compatible formats. Cohort filtering by profile type, regime, comorbidity, region, and date range is supported.
scenes.subtitle_text: CSV. JSON. FHIR. Cohort filtering. Full export.
scenes.visual_note: Export configuration panel. Format selector. Filter options. Clean interface.

scenes.voice_text: Access the anonymised dataset view to begin.
scenes.subtitle_text: Access the dataset view to begin.
